documentation.description:
RAII type over GNAT.Dir_Operations. It iterates over all directory
entries, including broken links and links to directories, so be wary to
skip as needed. "." and ".." are not iterated over. Order of iteration
is undefined. There is no limit on max name length. Names returned are
the base name directly stored in the directory.

simple_types.name: Dir_Iterator
simple_types.code:
type Dir_Iterator (<>) is limited private with
  Iterable => (First       => First,
               Next        => Next,
               Has_Element => Has_Element,
               Element     => Element);

subprograms.name: Element
subprograms.code: function Element (This : Dir_Iterator; C : Cursor) return Path

subprograms.name: Has_Element
subprograms.code: function Has_Element (This : Dir_Iterator; C : Cursor) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Next
subprograms.code: function Next (This : Dir_Iterator; C : Cursor) return Cursor
